utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each item in the final plan and whether it is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan specifies physical (€100/month), mental (€65/month), plus Preventive Care (€150/month) and Telemedicine (€10/month), with a total (€325/month). This is fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides PrimeHome Premium Coverage at €90/month. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides PrimeTravel Premium Plan at €115/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists Premium Insurance Membership with concierge at €20/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly €550 and annual €6,600. Fully specified.
All 5 items from the required format appear and are specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings. Map each: Health coverage uses LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health (€100/month) and LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health (€65/month), plus Preventive Care Package and Telemedicine add-on. Property coverage selects PrimeHome Premium Coverage. Travel coverage selects PrimeTravel Premium Plan. Additional services selects Premium Insurance Membership. Retrieve ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; Preventive Care Package rating 9; Telemedicine Services rating 10; PrimeHome Premium Coverage rating 10; PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10; Premium Insurance Membership rating 10.
